channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Atomic Industries CEO: America spent 60 years retreating from manufacturing. The next 100 are about rebuilding it
item.description: The American millennium will not arrive on its own — it must be built, industry by industry, community by community.

item.title: Wendy Schmidt: Three centuries of science is something to celebrate
item.description: George Washington died not knowing dinosaurs existed. Three centuries later, science has never needed more defense.

item.title: Harvard’s housing report has a darker message than affordability—the middle-class home was always a historical accident
item.description: Harvard's U.S. housing report points to an uncomfortable conclusion: homeownership is no longer something you earn, but something you inherit.

item.title: A source indicates President Trump will not get what he wants from Kevin Warsh, as inflation pressures the Fed to raise rates.
item.description: Key information to review before starting your workday.
